message:
chore(harness): fix all clippy warnings across 28 files (bd-1910)

Fix ~60 clippy pedantic/nursery warnings: unnecessary Debug formatting
(path:? → path.display()), loop variable indexing → enumerate, redundant
clone, needless collect, bool::then in filter_map, and dead_code attrs
for unused pub functions in perf_loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
